docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-24-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DERAMBAKHSH, AALA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHENG-BENNETT, ALICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $125 SERVED APR-15-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG-BENNETT, ALICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-24-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF AALA DERAMBAKHSH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALICE CHENG-BENNETT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY DERAMBAKHSH, AALA AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG-BENNETT, ALICE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
